title: Hallow Knight Totem
description: This resource pack replaces the standard 2D totem with a 3D model of the main character from the game Hallow Knight
body:
![example (in game)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f74d948a4f8dd1250bc0696f954b61790c62e3b7_0.webp)

**Tired of that boring 2D totem?**  
- Download this resource pack that will transform it into a 3D model of the main character from the game Hallow Knight!  

**The author of the model (the main character):** [Искусство Дрикса 🍁](https://t.me/Driks_M_Offical)  
**If you find a bug, write to me on Telegram:** [Gugopleks](https://t.me/Gugopleks)
